entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop produced and processed for oil in Nigeria

entities.name: SAMNUT 24
entities.description: An improved variety of groundnut characterized by higher yield and better haulm quality

entities.name: LOCAL VARIETY
entities.description: The traditional groundnut variety used by farmers before the introduction of improved varieties

entities.name: HAULMS YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the stems and leaves of the groundnut plant

entities.name: TASTE
entities.description: The flavor profile of groundnut haulms affecting animal preference

entities.name: DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The ease with which groundnut haulms are broken down during animal digestion

entities.name: OIL PROCESSING
entities.description: The process of extracting oil from groundnut seeds

entities.name: ANIMAL FEEDING
entities.description: The practice of using crop residues as fodder for livestock

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the groundnut production communities are located

entities.name: BUNKURE
entities.description: The community in Nigeria where the women's group is active

entities.name: BUNKURE WOMEN GROUP
entities.description: A community group of women active in groundnut production and oil processing
